title: Appendix: Useful Mathematical Formulas
summary: This page presents key mathematical reference formulas including Taylor and Maclaurin series expansions, power series for common functions (exponential, trigonometric, hyperbolic tangent, and binomial), and fundamental trigonometric identities. The Taylor series generalizes function approximation around a point, while the power series provide infinite polynomial representations. Trigonometric identities include Euler's formula, double-angle formulas, and Pythagorean identities.
